resolution_policy.unresolved_rule: No draft artifact is promoted by this index. Conflicting or unratified authority is recorded as CONFLICTING or UNRESOLVED.
resolution_policy.supersession_rule: A proposed or conditionally approved replacement does not change current authority status until all required replacement, ratification, and deprecation evidence exists.

conflicts: Live worker version, bindings, routes, secrets, and R2 writes were not verified in R0.
The Worker inserts ended_at and meta into ovc.ovc_run_reports_v01, while repository DDL and the live table use finished_at and have no meta column.
Option A semantic columns remain physically present and writable as tolerated legacy, but are non-authoritative and forbidden as B, C, or D inputs.
objects.resolution_basis: The frozen v0.1 operation catalog and ACTIVE A1 contract define the operation. Data-flow canon v0.2 tolerates physical semantic legacy while denying downstream authority; run-report implementation and deployment state still conflict with the verified table.
The v0.1 catalog binds the checkpointed implementation and the observed workflow targets the verified canonical table.
The v0.1 catalog and ACTIVE A2 contract agree on the M15 ingest target and checkpointed implementation.

conflicts: The operator rejected queue-based Path1 as canonical, while .github/workflows/main.yml still schedules queue execution and both queue workflows can mutate repository state.
objects.resolution_basis: The range-based loop is canonical. Queue operation is retained only for historical analysis or a future controlled manual recovery contract; current scheduled use is nonconforming.
